AND THE BANK OF NEW YORK MELLON F/K/A THE BANK OF NEW YORK'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS TRANSFERRED TO DEPARTMENT 501 TO BE HEARD ON DECEMBER 19, 2012 AT 9:30 AM, BECAUSE THIS IS A HOUSING/FORECLOSURE MATTER. THE PLAINTIFF SHALL PROVIDE A COURTESY COPY OF THE OPPOSITION WITH A COVER LETTER REFLECTING THE NEW HEARING DATE IN COMPLIANCE WITH SAN FRANCISCO LOCAL RULE 2.6B BY NOVEMBER 26. UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, DEFENDANTS CWMBS, INC, BANK OF AMERICA, N.A., MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEMS INC, RECONTRUST COMPANY N.A. AND THE BANK OF NEW YORK MELLON'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT UNDER SUBMISSION. PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST TO SUBMIT ADDITIONAL PLEADINGS IS DENIED. DEFENDANT TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER. COURT NOW RULES ON THE SUBMITTED MATTER ADOPTING THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS' DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITH 20 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND TO ADDRESS ALL ISSUES RAISED IN THE DEMURRER. PLAINTIFFS SHALL POST $618,440.14 WITH COURT AT TIME FILING AMENDED COMPLAINT. COURT MODIFIES AND SIGNS ORDER SUBMITTED WITH THE PLEADINGS. JUDGE RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: M. SMITH

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-05-2013 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-19-2012 Continued To Feb-20-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-19-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jonathan Matthews (415-283-6320) of Law Offices of Jonathan D. Matthews for Isaac Gutierrez and Purifacacion Infante, plaintiffs and opposing parties; No other appearance

ARGUED - Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument takes DEFENDANTs CWMBS, INC, BANK OF AMERICA, N.A., MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEMS INC, RECONTRUST COMPANY N.A. and THE BANK OF NEW YORK MELLON's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT under submission. Plaintiff's request to submit additional pleadings is denied. Defendant to submit a proposed order. Court now rules on the submitted matter adopting the tentative ruling as follows: Defendants' Demurrer is sustained with 20 days leave to amend to address all issues raised in the demurrer. Plaintiffs shall post $618,440.14 with court at time filing amended complaint. Court modifies and signs order submitted with the pleadings. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Smith, Not reported (501)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-19-2012 Continued To Dec-19-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows:
DEFENDANTS CWMBS, INC., BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. AS ITSELF AND AS SUCCESSOR, MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEMS INC., RECON TRUST COMPANY N.A. AND THE BANK OF NEW YORK MELLON F/K/A THE BANK OF NEW YORK'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT - The demurrer is transferred to Department 501 to be heard on December 19, 2012, because this is a housing/foreclosure matter. The plaintiff shall provide a courtesy copy of the opposition with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date in compliance with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B by November 26. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077 = (302/EHG)
